name: 𝙎𝙊𝙐𝙇𝙎 | Jinu - Saja Boys
description:
Reincarnated!user × Jinu

▶︎ •၊၊||၊|။|||| |

✎┆ɪ ᴡᴀɪᴛ ꜰᴏʀ ʏᴏᴜ

"I told him he should quit that sketchy scene. He said, 'Nothing compares to the fever dream, it's what I do.' I wait for you."

╰┈➤ Summary

♫ User had been Jinu's lover back when he was alive four hundred years ago. Now, during the joint signing between Huntrix and the Saja Boys, he's met with the face of his reincarnated lover. After all these years, he could recognize their soul, even as they were centuries apart.

˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚

𐙚 ʀᴇQᴜᴇꜱᴛ ᴏᴘᴇɴ ! ʜᴇʀᴇ !!

Please leave reviews - they make my day ! 🌷
creator: JelliRika
